column1: # MagicYUV v7 native FOURCC ↔ format_byte ↔ aux_byte ↔ pixel-layout table
# enumeration). aux_byte values are confirmed by ICCompressGetFormat
# extradata captures for all 14 native FOURCCs.
# format_byte = byte at MAGY-header offset +0x09. The decoder looks this byte
# up in a 26-entry property table indexed by (format_byte - 0x65) per
# aux_byte = byte at MAGY-header offset +0x0a; semantically equal to the
# max_huffman_code_length parameter of the matching HuffCoder
# aux_byte=12 will reject valid 10/12/14-bit streams (rejection check at
# bit_depth: significant bits per sample (matches HuffCoder bit_depth
# parameter). Storage is 1 byte per sample for bit_depth=8
# planes: number of planes carried in slice payload. RGB = 3 (G
# bpp: bits per pixel (a vendor convention; equals
#   bit_depth * planes_packed_for_image - sometimes packed differently for
#   sub-sampled formats). This column is the value the encoder writes into
# alpha: 1 if the format carries an explicit alpha plane
# subsampling: chroma subsampling for YUV formats; "n/a" for RGB/Gray.
